A. The system exhibits several issues including task derailment, ignoring other agents' input, step repetition, information withholding, action-reasoning mismatch, disobeying task specification, weak verification, premature termination, and loss of conversation history. Specifically, agents repeatedly ask the same questions, ignore valid input from other agents, propose simplified implementations instead of finding the correct code, and terminate tasks prematurely without proper resolution. There are also instances of agents providing incorrect information or failing to verify outputs adequately.
